items.claim: Damen Pinez has a tendency to finish fights quickly.
items.quote: that'll work against Damen Pñas because he likes to get finishes quickly.

items.claim: Wang Kong lands 6.2 significant strikes per minute.
Tracy Cortez lands an average of two takedowns per three-round fight.
items.quote: she does get two over the course of three rounds on average

items.claim: Wang Kong has an 84% takedown defense rate.
Luke Riley has a 37% takedown defense rate.
Luke Riley is capable of winning by KO despite being taken down multiple times.
items.quote: Bogen Grad took him down four times in his uh UFC debut. He still landed the KO in the second round.
